name: Multiple Sensitive Virtual Machines Deleted within Short Period of Time
notes:
This rule triggers when multiple sensitive machines or security devices are being deleted succinctly. This may indicate an intruder is compromising sensitive information or getting hidden before an attack.

Note: The Sensitive Virtual Machines reference set must be populated with the relevant machines name.

If authorized users perform this action often, you can exclude them by adding a rule condition.
Please see "Suspicious Number of Modifications Made on Virtual Machines" for an example.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Deleted
when any of Machine Identifier (custom) are contained in any of Sensitive Virtual Machines - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), Security Devices - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Event Name, Username and different Machine Identifier (custom) in 45 minutes
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Event Name, Username and different Machine Identifier (custom) in 45 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Sensitive Virtual Machines Deleted within Short Period of Time on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Deleted
AND when any of Machine Identifier (custom) are contained in any of Sensitive Virtual Machines - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), Security Devices - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Event Name, Username and different Machine Identifier (custom) in 45 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Sensitive Virtual Machines Deleted within Short Period of Time
Event description: Detects multiple sensitive machines or security devices deleted succinctly.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
